# daytona_webhook_app_portal_access (Data Source)

Reads Svix consumer app portal access for a Daytona organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_webhook_app_portal_access" "automation" {
  organization_id = "org_1234567890"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) Svix consumer app portal authentication token.
- `url` (String) Svix consumer app portal URL.
